powers.label: Audit Agents
powers.prompt: Audit all installed agents. Check for outdated configs, missing prompts, and compatibility issues.

powers.label: Optimize
powers.prompt: Suggest optimizations for the current agent configuration. Identify redundancies and gaps.

powers.label: Validate All
powers.prompt: Validate all steer-runtime configurations. Check workspace.json, agent configs, and profile settings for errors.

powers.label: Sync Status
powers.prompt: Check steer-runtime sync status. Report version, last sync, and any pending updates.
